# THIS FILE INCLUDES ALL "G" LEVEL EXPRESSWAYS IN CHINA (2 DIGIT HIGHWAYS), NO SPURS OR AUXILIARY ROUTES

# BEIJING RADIAL EXPRESSWAYS
# G1 'JINGHA' BEIJING-HARBIN
# G2 'JINGHU' BEIJING-SHANGHAI
# G3 'JINGTAI' BEIJING-FUZHOU
# G4 'JINGGANG'AO' BEIJING-HONG KONG
# G5 'JINGKUN' BEIJING-KUNMING
# G6 'JINGZANG' BEIJING-LHASA (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G7 'JINGXIN' BEIJING-URUMQI (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)

# NORTH-SOUTH EXPRESSWAYS
# G11 'HEDA' HEGANG-DALIAN (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G15 'SHENHAI' SHENYANG-HAIKOU
# G25 'CHANGSHEN' CHANGCHUN-SHENZHEN
# G35 'JIGUANG' JINAN-GUANGZHOU
# G45 'DAGUANG' DAQING-GUANGZHOU  (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G55 'ERGUANG' ERENHOT-GUANGZHOU (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G59 'HUBEI' HOHHOT-BEIHAI (CONSTRUCTION NOT STARTED)
# G65 'BAOMAO' BAOTOU-MAOMING (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G69 'YINBAI' YINCHUAN-BAISE (CONSTRUCTION NOT STARTED)
# G75 'LANHAI' LANZHOU-HAIKOU (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G85 'YINKUN' YINCHUAN-KUNMING

# EAST-WEST EXPRESSWAYS
# G10 'SUIMAN' SUIFENHE-MANZHOULI
# G12 'HUNWU' HUCHUAN-ULANHOT
# G16 'DANXI' DANDONG-XILINHOT  (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G18 'RONGWU' RONGCHENG-WUHAI (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G20 'QINGYIN' QINGDAO-YINCHUAN
# G22 'QINGLAN' QINGDAO-LANZHOU (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G30 'LIANHUO' LIANYUNGANG-KHORGAS
# G36 'NINGLUO' NANJING-LUOYANG
# G40 'HUSHAAN' SHANGHAI-XIAN
# G42 'HURONG' SHANGHAI-CHENGDU (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G50 'HUYU' SHANGHAI-CHONGQING
# G56 'HANGRUI' HANGZHOU-RUILI (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G60 'HUKUN' SHANGHAI-KUNMING
# G70 'FUYIN' FUZHOU-YINCHUAN (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
# G72 'QUANNAN' QUANZHOU-NANNING (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)

# G78 'SHANKUN' SHANYOU-KUNMING (UNDER CONSTRUCTION)
